Approval handoff FAQ

Approval handoff summary

Approval handoff FAQ

Approval handoff FAQs matter when operators need direct answers about how rollback authority transfers between on-call leads and higher review tiers.

The FAQ explains review checkpoints, queue health evidence, and the fallback queues that must be documented before a handoff is accepted.

It also clarifies which fairness controls continue to apply while the handoff remains open.
